presentation: Building scalable, secure and intelligent Full Stack solutions with over 5 years of experience in backend, microservices, automation and AI integration for high-impact, global projects.
typed_strings: I am a Full Stack Developer.
services_intro: I offer specialized consulting and development services tailored to the needs of each project.

service_hourly.title: Technical Consulting
service_hourly.desc: Technical advice, architecture review, debugging, or specific integrations.

service_freelance.title: Freelance / Part-Time
service_freelance.desc: Development of specific modules, continuous maintenance, or part-time integration in your team.

service_fulltime.title: Full-Time Hiring
service_fulltime.desc: 100% dedication to your project, leading technical decisions and full stack development.

about_me_presentation.paragraph_1: Computer Engineer and Full Stack Developer with over 5 years of experience creating scalable, secure, and high-availability solutions for enterprise environments and international platforms.
about_me_presentation.paragraph_2: Specializing in modern backend and frontend technologies such as Python (Django, DRF, FastAPI), Node.js, TypeScript, React, and Next.js, with experience in designing REST APIs, GraphQL, and microservices-based architectures.
about_me_presentation.paragraph_3: I have participated in high-impact projects, including a global vaccine distribution platform with integration of logistics prediction models using Optilogic, optimizing resources and processes at a large scale.
about_me_presentation.paragraph_4: I also have experience in process automation using n8n and in integrating artificial intelligence models such as OpenAI GPT and Anthropic Claude for creating intelligent agents, RAG flows, and LLM-powered solutions.
about_me_presentation.paragraph_5: I adapt quickly to high-performance environments, working collaboratively with technical and business teams to build products focused on efficiency, scalability, and real results.
about_me_presentation.paragraph_6: Passionate about continuous learning, good development practices, and building modern digital experiences that generate impact and value in every project.

project_1.title: Ticketing System - backend
project_1.desc: System web of ticketing with: FastAPI, PostgreSQL and Docker. Allows you to create, manage and track incidents with authentication via Google OAuth 2.0.

project_2.title: Ticketing System - frontend
project_2.desc: Modern ticket management interface built with Next.js, Ant Design, and Tailwind CSS. It provides a seamless user experience for managing incidents and interacting with an AI-powered assistant.

project_3.title: Fisio Elite - Back
project_3.desc: [Python] Core backend infrastructure for the Fisio Elite platform. Elaborate on endpoints and features.

project_4.title: Fisio Elite - Front
project_4.desc: This template provides a minimal setup to get React working in Vite with HMR and some ESLint rules. Currently, two official plugins are available.

project_5.title: Inverco - Back
project_5.desc: This project is a Django backend with a PostgreSQL database, caching with Redis, authentication with API Key, and use of the Google Places API for restaurant search.

project_6.title: Inverco - Front
project_6.desc: This project is an administrative dashboard for the InverColombia platform. It uses React.js along with Material-UI and communicates with a backend through a REST API.

tech_stack_subtitle: Technologies I use to build robust and scalable solutions.

exp_1.desc: Leading the design of high-performance architectures, AI integrations (LLMs, RAG), and automated workflows for international clients.

exp_2.desc: Developed scalable microservices using Python and Node.js. Optimized database performance and CI/CD pipelines.

exp_3.desc: Built robust RESTful APIs and integrated payment gateways. Focused on security and system reliability.

contact_me_subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to explore an opportunity? Let's talk!
